description: CompositionPink printed kurti made of 100% cotton, has a V-neck with yellow lacing which has sequin and thread detailing on it, mock brass ball buttons, three-quarter sleeves with contrast yellow lacing at the edges, and a vented hemFittingRegularWash careWash separately as colour may bleedDo not bleachDry inside out in shadeWarm ironThis aurelia kurta speaks volumes of your class and exudes femininity with its timeless design and cut. The handcrafted fabric will keep you going great throughout the day, while the classy design will make you the talk of the town. Pair it with leggings or jeans and flats for an ultra femme look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in kurtisHeight-5.7", Chest-33", Waist-26"
